raw_source.title: [Remote] RSS3 is looking for Human Resources Specialist
raw_source.body:
## Who we are
At Natural Selection Labs, we are dedicated to creating an internet that supports the free flow of information online.
All our work is **open-source** on GitHub: https://github.com/NaturalSelectionLabs
We believe in the basic right of internet users to create, disseminate, and distribute information away from the stronghold of centralized governing systems.
We are a **globally distributed** organization: all our members work remotely from different countries including the US, Japan, New Zealand, the UK, and China. We promote flexible working hours, so both early birds and night owls are welcome!
Our team is equal, open, and free. Since our establishment, we have made tremendous progress and are incredibly proud of the team culture and atmosphere that teammates experience in our organization.
We have all-star backers such as Coinshares Ventures, Coinbase Ventures, and Balaji Srinivasan to support us in expanding our decentralized webfeed and content distribution protocol. We also launched our $RSS3 auction in February and are eager to explore new journeys with more like-minded partners. Thus, we have more than sufficient ability to offer opportunities to talented individuals who meet our expectations.

## What we do
**RSS3**
RSS3 is a next-generation feed protocol that powers decentralized social, content, and e-commerce applications.
Homepage: https://rss3.io/
GitHub：https://github.com/NaturalSelectionLabs/RSS3
Twitter：https://twitter.com/rss3_

**RSS3-Hub-Data**
Before they go live, information about our distributed nodes is made free and open by making all RSS3 user data publicly available on GitHub, with 70,000+ users, 230,000+ relationships, and 2,200,000+ assets available [here](https://github.com/NaturalSelectionLabs/RSS3-Network-Data/blob/main/statics/overall.json) to see in real-time
GitHub：https://github.com/NaturalSelectionLabs/RSS3-Hub-Data
Moreover, the corresponding SDKs, Hub, and extensions for RSS3 are available on our [GitHub](https://github.com/NaturalSelectionLabs/RSS3). You can also learn more about us via our [blogs](https://rss3.notion.site/) and our [Twitter](https://twitter.com/rss3_).

## What we offer
•	A chance to directly participate in the Internet revolution and make the world a better place
•	Opportunities to participate & contribute to the world’s top Web3 projects
•	A team of loving and competent companions!
•	A **fully open-sourced** development/engineering approach
•	**FULLY-REMOTE** role with very flexible working hours
•	An **AWESOME & CARING** company culture
•	Highly competitive allowances and benefits
•	We are committed to diversity and welcome talented applicants from all walks of life to apply! We are LGBTQ+ and POC-friendly, with no restrictions on applicants’ nationality, hobbies, personal preferences, etc.

## What the role entails
Duties and responsibilities of a **Human Resources Specialist** include:
•	Ensure job descriptions are up to date and meet the requirements of each department
•	Post job postings on different effective platforms and find talents efficiently
•	Complete the preliminary resume screening and interview process
•	Organize the talent pool efficiently and clearly document the evaluation of talents
•	Follow up on interview results and respond to emails with flexibility

## What expertise and qualities do you need to have?
•	At least one year of HR experience (experience in tech company is advantageous)
•	Basic knowledge of blockchain/Web 3.0 and what RSS3 is doing
•	Exceptional communication and writing skills in English
•	Have excellent interview skills
•	Strong interpersonal relationship skills
•	A positive and optimistic attitude, enthusiastic about communicating and socializing with others
•	An excellent team player, able to collaborate with our team to achieve outstanding results
•	Commitment to our core value: that humans could and must create, disseminate, and distribute information with an approach that is as healthy and as equal as possible

## Contact
Please send your resume to
talent@rss3.io

comments.body: 欢迎您提交招聘信息，Rebase 会整理招聘内容，通过公众号发出。
comments.author: github-actions[bot]
